attacking_style: Launches solo attacks on uncategorized pre-climb sections before final ascents, demonstrating ability to sustain efforts through severe gradient changes (12%+) to hold off chasers.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from available observations.
terrain_preference: Thrives on brutal gradient zones and unconventional attack points (uncategorized climbs). Breakaway specialist who excels when allowed freedom before categorized climbs.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to establish specific vulnerabilities, though breakaway specialization suggests potential weakness in mass sprint or pure GC climbing scenarios.
key_patterns: Attacks before categorized climbs on uncategorized sections to gain surprise advantage
Sustains solo efforts through extreme gradients (12%+) after initial attack
Multiple stage wins confirm deliberate breakaway specialization strategy, not opportunistic
form_trajectory: positive: second stage win at 2018 Vuelta confirming repeatable breakaway winning ability
